pageContext.name: Wrecker 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: The Bruiser of The Bad Batch™ Smashes on New Silver Coin!  Made from 1oz pure silver, the coin showcases a colored image of Wrecker™ in his armor, ready to cause a ruckus. Detailed engravings of his helmet and the phrases 'The Bad Batch' and 'The Clone Force 99' are also included. A mirror finish for the background completes this splendid design. As a legal tender coin, the obverse bears the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II.   It is presented inside an impressive Star Wars™ branded case, which includes compelling images of the entire squad. A Certificate of Authenticity can be found at the back of the box, along with the coin's unique number in the mintage of 3,000.   You can be one of the few people to own this rare collectible, so don't delay. Order now!
